codeReview.summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and runtime diagnostics implementation. The change correctly reclassifies listener-bound seeded bootstrap and stale-disallowed cases from the stored live snapshot state, which matches the feature goal of restoring HTTP 200 diagnostics envelopes on the shared 3103 service without regressing validation-only override semantics.

summary: Pass. The feature’s single-commit change is narrowly scoped to runtime diagnostics classification, aligns with the runtime-refactor worker procedure, and the reviewed evidence supports that it fixes the prior 3103 /diagnostics/runtime failure while preserving covered diagnostics modes.
